title: Meituan LongCat 2.0 (Tested): China's 1.6T OPEN MODEL looks CRAZY!
summary: Meituan has released LongCat-2.0, a 1.6 trillion parameter Mixture-of-Experts model designed for long-context, coding, research, and agentic tasks. The model activates approximately 48 billion parameters per token and was trained on AI ASIC superpods rather than Nvidia GPUs. Official benchmarks show strong performance on agentic coding and reasoning tasks, though preliminary testing revealed mixed results.
writeup: The video covers Meituan's release of LongCat-2.0, a 1.6 trillion parameter Mixture-of-Experts model aimed at long-context, coding, research, and agentic tasks, with roughly 48 billion parameters activated per token. Notably, it was trained on AI ASIC superpods rather than Nvidia GPUs, a point of interest given the current hardware landscape. Official benchmarks report strong results on agentic coding and reasoning, and the video's own preliminary testing produced mixed results.
